event: Fresco of a seated saint in a church
symbols: red book — the Scriptures or the saint's writings
description: A medieval fresco on a church wall showing an elderly bearded saint seated under a pointed Gothic arch. He has a halo and wears dark monastic robes. He holds a staff in one hand and a red book in the other. The fresco is aged and partially damaged, with portions of the paint faded. Decorative border patterns frame the figure. The style is characteristic of Italian Trecento church decoration.

_meta.title: Church of San Lorenzo (San Giovanni Valdarno), Toscana, Italy
